PostToolUse.description: Warn on potential secrets in written files

hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, re, os
output = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT', '')
patterns = [r'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}', r'AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}', r'password\s*=\s*["\'][^"\']+["\']']
for p in patterns:
    if re.search(p, output):
        print(f'[dham-hook] WARNING: Possible secret detected in modified file', file=sys.stderr)
        break
" 2>&1 || true
